name: INNODATA INC
summary: Innodata Inc. (INOD) is a global data engineering and AI systems services company supporting development, training, post-training, evaluation, and deployment of advanced AI systems. The company provides training and post-training data development, alignment and preference optimization, capabilities and safety evaluation, and AI enablement services. Clients include leading technology companies, frontier AI laboratories, and enterprises, including five of the so-called Magnificent Seven tech companies.

products.name: AI Training and Post-Training Data Solutions
products.description: Design and execution of data pipelines supporting large-scale AI training and post-training cycles with quality, consistency, and auditability.

products.name: Model Evaluation (Evals) Services
products.description: Capabilities, alignment, safety, and regression evaluations combining human judgment with automation for interpretable and auditable results.

products.name: Red Teaming and Adversarial Evaluations
products.description: Structured red teaming to surface failure modes, probe prompt-injection and jailbreak vulnerabilities, and test misuse scenarios in AI systems.

products.name: AI Model Deployment and Integration
products.description: Supports operationalizing AI systems including model customization, workflow integration, context engineering, and continuous quality assurance.

products.name: AI-Enabled Industry Platforms
products.description: Domain-specific platforms delivering differentiated value through proprietary expertise for specific market requirements.

products.name: Agility
products.description: A segment platform with dependency on content providers; specific details not fully described in the provided excerpt.

products.name: Digital Data Solutions (DDS)
products.description: Project-based data services segment with revenue concentration in a limited number of customers on primarily at-will contracts.
